With a start in technology back in 2010 surrounding the Palm/webOS ecosystem, Patrick spent his formative years developing mobile applications as well as blogging for various publications, eventually leading to starting his own website in 2014\. items.title: [Tom's Hardware] Bambu Lab launches PLA Pure filament — New material boasts kid-safe toy certifications and "asbestos-free" talc
items.content_html: Bambu Lab PLA Pure (Image credit: Tom's Hardware) 2 Newsletter Bambu Lab announced a new line of PLA filament that might just be too good to be true. It’s PLA Pure, a new family-friendly, clean printing, and “food safe” material that’s UL Greenguard certified. PLA Pure is available now at Bambu Lab’s Official Store. It comes in three soft pastel colors, plus black and white, and retails for $24.99 on a spool or $21.99 as a refill. The company says PLA Pure is the answer to rising concerns from new makers who want to keep a 3D printer in their family room, and share the space with children and

items.content_html: The Bambu Lab A1 Mini miniature wizard we produced during our review process (Image credit: Future) Jump To: * Top deal * Also consider 0 Newsletter If you're new to 3D printing, I've found an incredibly good beginner-friendly budget 3D printer deal - with the Bambu Lab A1 Mini Combo now $309 (was $459) direct from Bambu Lab. It's also on sale in the UK, where the Combo version is down to £239 (was £259). items.title: [CNET] Best Home Security Cameras for Apple HomeKit and Siri in 2026
items.content_html: Security cameras offer targeted home protection, but Apple fans have long had a problem. Few security cams support Apple HomeKit video and work with the Apple Home app. When they do, they often lose features as a result. ## Our Picks Aqara's G3 camera hub on a black desk. ## Best all-around home security camera for Apple ### Aqara Camera Hub G3 $90 at Amazon **Why I like it:** Aqara's 2K camera is not only a solid indoor performer, it also offers very easy connections to Apple Home and a robust pan/tilt design that can easily follow the action. items.title: [Tom's Hardware] Bambu Lab's big anniversary sale is live with up to 52% off — score huge discounts on their most popular 3D printers and accessories
items.content_html: Tech Deals Cover (Image credit: Future) 0 Newsletter Bambu Lab has launched a host of Anniversary deals in its latest sale. Grab discounts of up to 52% on Bambu Lab's latest and greatest 3D printers, AMS addon units, and filament. Bambu Lab, one of the biggest names in 3D printer manufacturing, has kicked off its latest anniversary sale, which is running from today (June 15th) until July 15, 2026, and if last year's sale is anything to go by, the best deals sell out rather quickly, so don't hesitate to jump on that deal if you see something you like.
